dict.string: TG Pro is used for fan control, temperature monitoring and diagnostics. It supports all Intel (64-bit) and Apple Silicon models.
If the user chooses to sign up for the Tunabelly Software newsletter, this is used to add their email to the list.
This connection is not essential and can be safely denied. However it will not be possible to sign up for the newletter in-app.
Used to upload anonymous crashlogs to the Sentry.io service.
This connection is not essential and can be safely denied. However any crashlogs will not be sent to be analyzed by Tunabelly Software.
Used to check for updates (for improvements, bug and security fixes) and hosted files with up-to-date information needed for some features.
If this connection is denied, TG Pro will not be able to check or notify about new updates, or get up-to-date information for some app features.
Required for the licensing service to process trials, activations, and deactivations.
If this connection is denied, trials, activations and deactivations of licenses will not work.
Used by the Paddle licensing service for verifying legacy activations.
If blocked, the license key may need to be re-entered unless it has already been migrated to the new system.

bam.nr-data.net, newrelic.com, newrelic.net, doubleclick.net, www.google-analytics.com, www.googletagmanager.com, google-analytics.com, nr-data.net, hexagon-analytics.com, js-agent.newrelic.com, gosquared.com, evidence.io, zdassets.com
Used by the Paddle licensing service for their internal analytics.
This connection is not essential and can be safely denied. All licensing features will still work properly.
Used by the Paddle licensing service.
This connection is not essential and can be safely denied. All licensing features will still work properly.
Used by the Paddle licensing service to retrieve app details as well as TG Pro to upload support packages.
If this connection is denied, TG Pro may not be able to upload support packages and Paddle may not have up-to-date info.
Used to upload support packages (with the user's consent) which do not include any personal identifiable information. They are only used for debugging support issues.
If this connection is denied, TG Pro will not be able to upload support packages.
